problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Combining Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
